response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Handcoded lyrics in the video were verified to match the reference lyrics, with the exception of 'ゆずれない衝動' instead of 'ゆれない衝動', which was manually corrected using the hardcoded lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both song lyrics and translating the spoken MC segment as well as the prominent handwritten letter at the end of the video under the Visual Events rule.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to anchor tightly around audio vocalizations for the song and the speech, followed by logical chunking of the on-screen handwritten letter during the silent ending.

subtitles.original: もっと輝くよ そうだろう
subtitles.english: We will shine brighter, right?

subtitles.original: 叫べばいい
subtitles.english: Just scream it out!

subtitles.original: 憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい歌
subtitles.english: A song more dazzling than longing, and an intense song.

subtitles.original: いつか耳を塞いだ
subtitles.english: The hands that once blocked my ears...

subtitles.original: その両手がきっと翼になる
subtitles.english: ...will surely become wings.

subtitles.original: そう思うんだ
subtitles.english: That's what I believe.

subtitles.original: ゆずれない衝動
subtitles.english: This unyielding impulse.

subtitles.original: 高く飛べるよ そうだろう
subtitles.english: We can fly high, right?

subtitles.original: 抑えられない
subtitles.english: It cannot be held back.

subtitles.original: 羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
subtitles.english: Even if no one grants permission for me to spread my wings,

subtitles.original: もう決めたよ 迷わない
subtitles.english: I've decided, I won't hesitate anymore.

subtitles.original: 向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって
subtitles.english: Even the headwind is surely proof that I'm moving forward...

subtitles.original: 君に伝えるんだ
subtitles.english: ...that is what I'll convey to you.

subtitles.original: 何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
subtitles.english: Calling your name over and over, I'll walk once again.

subtitles.original: 皆さん本日生誕祭に来てくださってありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you so much for coming to my birthday celebration today!

subtitles.original: ソロライブ楽しみにしててね！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to my solo concert!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ルイ友へ♡
subtitles.english: [Letter: To Louis-tomo ♡]

subtitles.original: みんなの応援のおかげで……ついに私もソロライブできるよ！！本当にありがとう♡
subtitles.english: [Letter: Thanks to everyone's support... I can finally hold my solo concert!! Thank you so much ♡]

subtitles.original: もっともっと努力して光り輝く階段をのぼって、いろんな景色をみせてね ➔ 任せろー！
subtitles.english: [Letter: I'll work harder to climb the shining stairs... 'Show me all kinds of scenery' ➔ 'Leave it to us!']

subtitles.original: 私の物語には君が必要です！！これからもよろしくね！！ るい 2026.06.11
subtitles.english: [Letter: You are indispensable to my story!! Please look after me from now on as well!! - Rui, 2026.06.11]
